text.message: 0 brick what are these offers, no offence
giving 1:1 to someone with 10 cards and an obvious city trade?
So if black does same thing no comment from you?

orange can't settle anywhere and blue had no cards lol
they are double playing at the moment
it's a game, gotta steal from somebody lol
I wanna make red suffer with such poor table talk
yes, try not to steal from last place?
hey oj when you know you are gaslighting, maybe tone down the tenor
i mean a bad rob is a bad rob lol
why did you ask me to go after blue? are you dating oj?
why isn't he going after orange? clearly the winner?
he did it again red! get him!
yeah thats why i said lets hope so
but seems like they have vp
which is bad they'll be on 9
feel like you want me to keep road red lol
relax at least let me play
whining about robs is so cringe. and goes away at higher rating
I am not higher rated like you
when i have no shot in the game, you cant just whine and moan. what you offering me to give me a shot?
instead of typing like a maniac
If you want me to take road
you have 10 cards you can take road if you want lol
lol after you use YOP for 2 ore?
